# ABC Dataset Download Instructions

The ABC CAD dataset should be downloaded from the official ABC dataset distribution site:

https://deep-geometry.github.io/abc-dataset/

This repository does not redistribute the full ABC dataset. The dataset is referenced only for polygonal surface reconstruction and topology-conditional parametric completion evaluation.

Only derived benchmark summaries and compact evaluation metadata are included in this repository. The original ABC dataset remains governed by its original license and terms of use.
